title: NFL, Verizon, NBCUniversal and Adobe are among the 2026 Digiday Content Marketing Awards Winners
summary: This year’s Digiday Content Marketing Awards winners demonstrate how brands are shifting toward more authentic, community-driven approaches to content. By partnering with creators, experts and complementary brands, organizations are building trust while reaching audiences...

title: U.S. Navy Aircraft Carrier Hosted International Helicopter Exchange
summary: The USS Theodore Roosevelt is leading the Exercise Rim of the Pacific, which began on June 24 and will run through July 31

title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
summary: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.
